name: scheme-js
description: Scheme interpreter for Node.js and browsers (R5RS / R7RS)

scripts.test: node scripts/build.js && node test/r5rs/test_r5rs_extra.js && node test/r5rs/test_syntax_rules.js && node test/r5rs/test_r7rs.js && node test/r5rs/test_r7rs_large.js && node test/js-interop/test_js_interop.js && node test/debugger/test_debugger.js
